Class Question

java.lang.Object
application.Question
public class Question extends Object
Represents a question in the Q&A system. Contains question content, metadata, and associated answers.

  • Constructor Details

    • Question

      public Question(String title, String content, String askedBy)
      Constructor to create a new Question. (ID auto generated)
      Parameters:
      title - String containing the title of the question.
      content - String containing the contents of the question.
      askedBy - String containing the username of the person asking the question.

    • Question

      public Question(int id, String title, String content, String askedBy, LocalDateTime createdAt, boolean isResolved, boolean isFlagged, int resolvedAnswerId)
      Constructor for loading a question from the database.
      Parameters:
      id - ID of the question.
      title - String containing the title of the question.
      content - String containing the contents of the question.
      askedBy - String containing the username of the person asking the question.
      createdAt - Time and date the question was created.
      isResolved - Boolean of whether the question is resolved.
      isFlagged - Boolean of whether the question is flagged or not.
      resolvedAnswerId - ID of the answer responsible for resolving the question.

  • Method Details

    • validateTitle

      public static String validateTitle(String title)
      Method to validate the title of a question.
      Parameters:
      title - String containing the title of the question.
      Returns:
      Question title if its valid.
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - If the title is invalid.

    • validateContent

      public static String validateContent(String content)
      Method to validate the contents of a question.
      Parameters:
      content - String containing the contents of the question.
      Returns:
      Question contents if they are valid.
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - If the content is invalid.

      Gets the number of unread answers.

      Number of answers where isRead is false.

      Sets the question ID.

      Sets the question content.
      Parameters:
      content - String to set content to.

    • markAsResolved

      public void markAsResolved(int answerId)
      Sets the value of isResolved to true and the value of resolvedAnswerId.
      Parameters:
      answerId - ID of answer resolving question.

    • setIsFlagged

      public void setIsFlagged(boolean tf)
      Sets the value of isFlagged.

    • markAsUnresolved

      public void markAsUnresolved()
      Sets the value of isResolved to false and resets the value of resolvedAnswerId.

    • addAnswer

      public void addAnswer(Answer answer)
      Adds an answer to the List of Answers for this question.
      Parameters:
      answer - Answer to add to this question.

    • setAnswers

      public void setAnswers(List<Answer> answers)
      Sets the answers for this question.
      Parameters:
      answers - List of Answers for this question.

      public String getFormattedDate()
      Gets the date and time the question was created at but formatted.
      Returns:
      createdAt.

    • toString

      public String toString()
      Gets question details in a formatted form.
      Overrides:
      toString in class Object
      Returns:
      String with id, title, askedBy, number of answers, and isResolved.
